items.title: Transfer rumors, news: Salah's agent in Al Ittihad talks as star open to Liverpool exit
items.description: Liverpool star Mohamed Salah has given his agent the green light to open talks with Saudi Pro League club Al Ittihad, Transfer Talk has the latest.

items.title: Brandon Figueroa rises after upset win over Nick Ball
items.description: Brandon Figueroa stopped Nick Ball in round 12 to claim the WBA featherweight championship and climb in the rankings. Here are the latest ESPN divisio...

items.title: Sources: Ex-Titans HC Callahan joins Giants' staff
items.description: The Giants are hiring former Titans head coach Brian Callahan as their quarterbacks coach and passing game coordinator, sources told ESPN.

items.title: WNBA player offers to testify vs. Pearce in DV case

items.title: Lemley, Kauf take gold, silver for U.S. in moguls
items.description: Elizabeth Lemley and Jaelin Kauf won gold and silver for the United States in women's freestyle moguls skiing on Wednesday.
